news.headline: Singapore loyalty programs market expected to reach $589.7 million by 2024, with projected $829.4 million by 2028. 50+ KPIs included.
news.summary: A report on the Singapore Loyalty Programs Market indicates significant growth potential in the region. The market is projected to grow by 10.5% annually, reaching a value of US$589.7 million by 2024. This data includes insights on over 50 key performance indicators related to loyalty programs, covering trends by end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. The report has been recently introduced on ResearchAndMarkets.com's platform, offering valuable intelligence for businesses operating in this sector.

news.headline: Avangrid's CMP awarded $31.8M federal grant for modernizing power grid in Maine to support renewable energy deployment.
news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., a sustainable energy company and part of the Iberdrola Group, revealed that Central Maine Power (CMP) will receive $31.8 million in federal funding. The aim is to implement advanced technologies for a more efficient power grid in Maine, facilitating the integration of renewable energy. The grant was secured from the U.S. Department of Energy’s Grid Resilience and Innovation Partnerships (GRIP) initiative.

news.headline: Frontera Energy Corp. announces preliminary results of substantial issuer bid to purchase up to CAD$40.5 from shareholders.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on October 18, 2024, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) shared the initial outcomes of its significant issuer bid. The bid involved the company offering to buy back shares from shareholders for cancellation with a total value of CAD$40.5 million.

news.headline: Pan Global raises private placement financing to $7 million due to new institutional investor orders, mainly from European investors.
news.summary: Investors from Europe make up over 80% of the total financing amount. The net proceeds will be used to support the 2025 exploration program, which includes the debut drill program at a particularly high-interest location.

news.headline: Valour Inc., a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies, is transferring 19 ETPs to Spotlight Stock Market in Stockholm to boost its position in Nordic market.
news.summary: Valour Inc., a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies, is making a significant strategic shift in the Nordic market by relocating 19 of its Exchange-Traded Products (ETPs) from the Nordic Growth Market to the Spotlight Stock Market in Stockholm. The move is designed to bolster its standing in the Nordic ETP industry and foster the expansion of crypto-related financial instruments...

news.headline: Endo shares CCH studies at ASPS conference, proceeding to Phase 3 with new patients. Oct. 18, 2024 in Malvern, PA.
news.summary: Endo, Inc. recently shared findings from Phase 1 and Phase 2 trials of collagenase clostridium histolyticum (CCH) in individuals with plantar fibromatosis. The company is actively recruiting participants for a Phase 3 study. The updates were revealed in a presentation held in MALVERN, Pennsylvania on October 18, 2024. Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) made the announcement regarding the progress in this research.

news.headline: UScellular sells spectrum assets to Verizon for $1.0 billion. Deal announced in Chicago on Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, United States Cellular Corporation confirmed a deal with Verizon Communications Inc. to offload some of its retained spectrum licenses for a sum of $1.0 billion. This move marks a significant transaction between the two companies, with United States Cellular Corporation listed as USM on the NYSE and Verizon Communications Inc. trading as VZ on both the NYSE and Nasdaq.

news.headline: Treasury Bonds auction, RIKB 27 0415 and RIKS 37 0115, yielded successful results.
Antelope Enterprise sells out first phase of planned energy production, with 9 MW of electricity highly sought after.
news.summary: A 9 MW electricity resource owned by the company is currently in high demand.

news.headline: Royale Energy to simplify capital structure for future growth acceleration.
news.summary: Royale Energy Inc. has recently streamlined its capital structure in preparation for future expansion efforts. By simplifying their financial framework, the company aims to facilitate growth opportunities and enhance operational efficiency. This move comes as part of Royale Energy Inc.'s broader strategy to bolster its position in the market. The company management believes that this restructuring will better position them for success in the future.

news.headline: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. to discuss Q3 financial results on Nov 12, 2024 at 12pm ET after releasing on Nov 11, 2024.
news.summary: Crescent Capital BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: CCAP) based in Los Angeles disclosed that its financial results for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024 will be unveiled on Monday, November 11, 2024, upon the market's closure. The company has extended an invitation to all individuals interested to join its webcast/conference call set for Tuesday, November 12, 2024 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on the financial outcomes of the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: GITEX GLOBAL 2024 highlights 5G and AI, with 'Intelligent Connectivity' conference; focused on the future of 5G with 5,000 attendees in Dubai.
news.summary: A significant event, the 'Intelligent Connectivity' conference took place over one day during the prestigious tech event in DUBAI, UAE on October 18, 2024. This event, considered the world's largest and highly rated, delved into the future of 5G and autonomous vehicles. With a specific focus on 5G technology, GITEX GLOBAL 2024 highlighted the latest advancements in this field.

news.headline: China implements measures to stimulate markets as economy growth dips.

US stocks likely to end week on a strong note, boosted by Netflix Q3 earnings. Nasdaq +0.39%, S&P 500 +0.17%, Dow +0.03%. Gold hits new highs. China's Q3 GDP beats estimates. Geopolitical tensions affect oil prices.
news.summary: Wall Street is expected to have a positive start on Friday, driven by a positive response to Netflix, Inc.’s earnings. Tech sector may see a lift as earnings news flow from the sector is set to increase next week. China’s third-quarter GDP exceeded estimates, easing trader fears. Gold prices continue to rise, while oil is facing volatility due to geopolitical tensions. Futures performance shows Nasdaq 100 up by 0.39%, S&P 500 up by 0.17%, Dow up by 0.03%, and R2K up by 0.46%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust rose by 0.23% to $583.61, and Invesco QQQ ETF jumped by 0.51% to $493.75. Last session saw U.S. stocks ending narrowly mixed with some volatility before closing on a mixed note. Dow Industrials closed at fresh intraday and closing highs, S&P 500 hit an intraday high. Earnings and Federal Reserve officials' speeches will be key influencers on Friday’s session.

news.headline: Ally Financial (NYSE: ALLY) reports Q3 2024 financial results in Charlotte, N.C. View full details online.
news.summary: Ally Financial Inc., a financial services company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced its third quarter 2024 financial results. The company's stock, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALLY, presented this information on October 18, 2024. For more details, interested parties can view the complete press release in PDF format. The press release, along with a presentation and financial supplement, are available through the Ally Financial Press Room.

news.headline: Ives predicts Apple's growth revival; Expected rise in stock prices.
Consumers Energy receives $20 million grant from U.S. Department of Energy to add real-time visibility to grid with 18,000 devices.
news.summary: Consumers Energy has been awarded nearly $20 million by the U.S. Department of Energy to deploy new technology aimed at improving visibility into the impact of electric vehicles. This initiative will involve 18,000 devices measuring the effects of electric vehicles. The project, based in Jackson, Mich., is set to provide real-time data and insights into the growing presence of these vehicles.

news.headline: GITEX GLOBAL 2024 in Dubai hosts Middle East's largest data centre gathering to drive future of infrastructure, with AI-driven demand supporting region's growth.
news.summary: In the rapidly developing region, AI-powered demand is driving growth as a prominent data center hub. GITEX GLOBAL 2024, held in Dubai, UAE on Oct. 18, 2024, marks a significant moment for the area. This event, known as the world's largest tech and startup event, is setting the stage for in-depth discussions in the Middle East. With key emphasis on technology and innovation, the event is playing a pivotal role in shaping the region's future.

news.headline: Kroll secured a multi-million dollar settlement between Emergent Fidelity Technologies and FTX Estate, approved by US Bankruptcy Court.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in New York, the prominent independent global financial and risk advisory provider, Kroll, disclosed the approval of a multi-million dollar settlement between the liquidators of Emergent Fidelity Technologies, Ltd., and the FTX Estate. The settlement is a significant development in the financial and risk management sector, marking a crucial step in resolving the issues related to the companies involved.

news.headline: Natural Grocers® hosts "Spooktacular" event on Oct. 26, 2024, from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m. in Lakewood, CO. #familyfriendly #organic.
news.summary: Natural Grocers®, a prominent organic and natural grocery retailer in the United States based in Lakewood, Colorado, is hosting a "Spooktacular" event on October 26, 2024. The event, open to families, will feature the good4u® Crew from Natural Grocers and will run from 11:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m.

news.headline: CVS Health appoints new CEO David Joyner, forecasts missed Q3 earnings with adjusted EPS of $1.05-$1.10 versus consensus of $1.70, expected sales at $92.73 billion. Financial struggles continue.
news.summary: CVS Health Inc announced that David Joyner, a longtime executive, will be the new president and CEO, succeeding Karen Lynch. Joyner, who was previously president of CVS Caremark and an executive vice president, steps in as Roger Farah, the chairman of CVS's board, takes on the role of executive chair. The company projected that its third-quarter earnings, to be disclosed on November 6, will fall below Wall Street estimates. Estimates for the third quarter of 2024 indicate an adjusted EPS of $1.05-$1.10, compared to the anticipated $1.70, with expected sales of $92.73 billion. The third-quarter results reflect charges to record PDRs totaling about $1.1 billion, mainly attributed to the Medicare and Individual Exchange segments within its Health Care Benefits division.

news.headline: Recruit the right members for innovation team to boost success. Some thrive best alone. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Certain individuals excel in their work when given a solitary environment, thriving in their independence. However, when it comes to fostering innovation within a team, a different approach is necessary. To build an effective innovation team, it is crucial to recruit the right members who can collaborate and contribute diverse ideas. This allows for a multitude of perspectives and expertise to come together and cultivate groundbreaking innovations. Remember, the strength of an innovation team lies in its combined skills and creativity, making careful selection of members essential for success in this endeavor.

news.headline: Get latest news and analysis on Meta Platforms (META) stock, parent company of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay up to date with the latest news about Meta Platforms stock, including stock quotes and analysis for the parent company of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. For Meta Platforms (META), the latest company news, stock quotes, and chart analysis is available. Explore insights on Investor's Business Daily for comprehensive coverage of META stock.

news.headline: MESCIUS inc. wins awards in 2 categories at Visual Studio Magazine's 2024 Reader's Choice Awards.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 18, 2024, MESCIUS inc., a renowned worldwide supplier of enterprise software development tools, has been honored in Visual Studio Magazine's 2024 Reader's Choice Awards. The company's document APIs have achieved recognition by securing the silver and bronze positions in two component categories. MESCIUS continues to showcase its expertise and innovation, standing out in a competitive industry.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corp. completes dual follow-on sale to Acuren, delivering 2 CleanTech Industrial Roughening Laser 3050 systems.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC), a prominent developer of industrial laser systems, recently disclosed the completion of a dual follow-on sale to Acuren, a provider of asset protection services through nondestructive testing (NDT). LPC, traded on NASDAQ as LASE, confirmed the sale of two CleanTech Industrial Roughening Laser 3050 (CTIR-3050) systems to Acuren's facility in Sarnia, Ontario. This transaction highlights LPC's commitment to delivering cutting-edge laser solutions for a variety of material processing applications.

news.headline: InvestingGuide's Broker Awards prioritize quality over quantity to recognize firms providing top-tier service, security, and value.
news.summary: A recent report released by InvestingGuide in Valletta, Malta on October 18, 2024 detailed the process behind their Broker Awards. These prestigious awards aim to honor companies that excel in providing high-quality service, security, and value to their clients. The recognition is based on criteria that are essential for traders, emphasizing the importance of excellence in these areas. Jimmy, a representative from InvestingGuide, highlighted the significance of acknowledging companies that prioritize these key aspects to cater to the needs of traders.

news.headline: Avantor closes divestiture of clinical services business, emphasizing its focus on life sciences and advanced technology industries.
news.summary: Avantor, a prominent global supplier serving customers in the life sciences and advanced technology sectors, has recently completed the sale of its clinical services division. This move comes as part of the company's strategic plans to focus on its core mission-critical offerings. The divestiture of the clinical services business represents a significant step for Avantor, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AVTR. This decision aligns with Avantor's commitment to enhancing its position in key industries, with a goal to strengthen its portfolio and drive growth in targeted markets.

news.headline: REGENXBIO to present new data on ABBV-RGX-314 for wet AMD at AAO 2024.
news.summary: ROCKVILLE, Md., October 18, 2024 - Today, REGENXBIO Inc. (Nasdaq: RGNX) disclosed plans to unveil fresh interim findings regarding the subretinal administration of ABBV-RGX-314 in individuals with bilateral wet age-related macular degeneration (wet AMD) at the upcoming American Academy of Ophthalmology event.

news.headline: Karen C. Francis, Chair of Vontier, named to 2024 NACD Directorship 100 representing top leaders in corporate governance.
news.summary: Vontier Corporation, a key player in global critical technologies and solutions for the mobility ecosystem, shared that Karen C. Francis, the Board Chair at Vontier, has been selected for the 2024 NACD Directorship 100 by the National Association of Corporate Directors. This prestigious accolade acknowledges outstanding directors and leaders in corporate governance. Vontier, listed on NYSE as VNT, continues to make significant strides in the industry.

news.headline: Veolia CEO discusses AI benefits and challenges.
Market bets on European Central Bank rate cuts clash with Christine Lagarde's cautious approach.
Graphite One may secure up to $325 million financing from EXIM Bank for graphite material supply project in the US.
news.summary: A non-binding EXIM Letter of Interest suggests a potential financing option with a 15-year repayment period under the Make More In America initiative. The funding may also qualify for special consideration under the China and Transformational Exports Program. This support could benefit G1's operations.

news.headline: GridUnity receives $49.5 million in federal funding from GRIP program to fast-track grid interconnection and modernization efforts.
news.summary: GridUnity, a prominent provider of grid modernization solutions, has shared the news that they are receiving support from the U.S. Department of Energy's Grid Resilience and Innovation Partnerships (GRIP) Program. This partnership is aimed at aiding GridUnity's initiatives to modernize the U.S. transmission system. The announcement was made in Boston on October 18, 2024. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards enhancing the resilience and innovation in the country's grid infrastructure. By joining forces with the GRIP Program, GridUnity is expected to make substantial progress in this area, benefiting from the resources and expertise provided.

news.headline: Netcompany announces recent transactions related to its share buyback program.
Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE: IIPR) to announce Q3 2024 results on Nov 6; conference call at 10:00 a.m. PT.
news.summary: A company named Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE: IIPR) disclosed it will disclose its third-quarter financial outcomes for the period ending September 30, 2024, subsequent to the market closing on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. The event will feature key executives including Executive Chairman Alan Gold, President and CEO Paul Smithers, CFO David Smith, COO Catherine Hastings, and CIO Ben Regin. Investors can join the conference call at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time.

news.headline: CDW Corp (Nasdaq: CDW) will host webcast on Oct 30, 2024, 7:30am CT/8:30am ET to discuss Q3 2024 results.
news.summary: In Vernon Hills, Illinois, CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) disclosed plans to hold a webcast conference to review its performance for the third quarter of 2024. The company, known for delivering IT solutions to various sectors across the US, UK, and Canada, will conduct the call on Wednesday, October 30, 2024, commencing at 7:30 a.m. CT/8:30 a.m. ET. Investors and interested individuals can tune in to a live webcast featuring audio and slides for insights on the financial outcomes and strategies.

news.headline: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) acquires SOSS Door Hardware, a leading door hardware manufacturer in North America founded in 1903.
news.summary: Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global security products and solutions provider, has acquired SOSS Door Hardware (SOSS). SOSS, a leading manufacturer of premium hinges and door hardware, mainly operates in North American non-residential markets. Established in 1903, SOSS is known for inventing the concealed hinge. Its popular products include the SOSS Invisible Hinge, along with fire-rated, heavy-duty, and specialty hinges. The acquisition expands Allegion's portfolio in the security industry.

news.headline: FARO appoints Phillip Delnick as Global Sales SVP on Oct 21, 2024. Delnick to lead the global sales organization.
news.summary: In Lake Mary, Florida on October 18, 2024, FARO® revealed the appointment of Phillip Delnick as the new Senior Vice President of Global Sales, effective on October 21, 2024. FARO®, listed on Nasdaq as FARO, specializes in 4D digital reality solutions and is a prominent player in the industry. Phillip's new role marks a significant milestone for the company's sales division, showcasing his expertise and leadership in the field.

news.headline: S&H Rugs returns to High Point Interior Design Show in NC, featuring latest innovations in hand-knotted rugs.
news.summary: A well-known rug company, S&H Rugs, specializing in premium hand-knotted Persian, Oriental, and modern rugs, will be participating in the High Point Interior Design Show in North Carolina after a brief absence. The event is scheduled to take place from October 26 to 30, 2024. Interested individuals can explore their collection at the Suites during the show.

news.headline: Sanctuary Wealth wraps up annual Oasis National Conference in Hollywood, Florida, emphasizing bold ambition in wealth management. Elite financial advisors network and learn together.
news.summary: A conference for elite financial advisors in Hollywood, Florida will feature inspiring keynotes, valuable breakout sessions, and networking opportunities. The event will provide the first chance for Sanctuary and tru Independence partner firms to engage, connect, and learn together.

news.headline: Global Knives marks 40th year with exclusive collection. Limited edition available now.
news.summary: A well-known producer of high-end kitchen knives, Global Knives, unveiled its much-anticipated limited-edition 40th Anniversary Collection in Rancho Dominguez, California, on October 18, 2024. The exclusive line of knives can be purchased through the company's platform.

news.headline: Solar Alliance appoints Brian Timmons as new CEO, replacing Michael Clark. Timmons to lead company to next stage of growth.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Solar Alliance Energy Inc. (TSX-V: SOLR, OTC: SAENF), headquartered in Toronto and Knoxville, Tennessee, revealed that Michael Clark has resigned from his positions as CEO, President, and Director. Brian Timmons has been selected to succeed him as the new President and CEO of the company. The change in leadership was initiated by Clark, who decided to pursue different ventures. He will be supporting Solar Alliance to guarantee a smooth handover process.

news.headline: $AXP American Express Q3 2024 Earnings
Schlumberger’s stock rises after beating profit estimates despite lower revenue.
Veritone improves Veritone Track with AI vehicle tracking for law enforcement, offering faster & accurate investigations.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc. recently revealed major improvements to Veritone Track, their cutting-edge AI-powered digital video forensics tool for public safety and law enforcement. The enhancement allows users to swiftly and accurately pinpoint and monitor vehicles of interest based on make and model from various video sources. By avoiding personal reliance, this update streamlines investigative processes. Veritone Track is a key tool for enhancing efficiency in investigative efforts and supporting law enforcement agencies.

news.headline: Kaspi.kz reveals 3Q & 9M 2024 financial results. Operates Kaspi.kz Super App & Kaspi Pay Super App. Nasdaq:KSPI.
news.summary: Almaty, Kazakhstan - On October 18, 2024, Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz announced its unaudited consolidated IFRS financial results for the third quarter and nine months ended on September 30, 2024. Kaspi.kz, publicly traded on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KSPI, is the company behind the Kaspi.kz Super App for consumers and Kaspi Pay Super App for merchants. The financial report covers the company's performance during this period, providing insights into its revenue, profit, and overall financial health.

news.headline: P&G FY 2025 Q1 net sales down 1% to $21.7B, organic sales up 2%, diluted net EPS $1.61, a 12% decrease vs. prior year.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, the Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) announced its first-quarter fiscal year 2025 net sales of $21.7 billion, reflecting a one percent decrease compared to the previous year. Organic sales, which do not consider foreign exchange and M&A impacts, saw a two percent increase from the prior year's seven percent growth. Diluted net earnings per share stood at $1.61, marking a 12% drop from the previous year primarily due to increased non-core restructuring charges.

news.headline: TreeHouse Foods recalls waffle products due to Listeria risk. Remember to check products for safety.
news.summary: TreeHouse Foods, Inc., a company based in Oak Brook, Illinois, announced on October 18, 2024, that they are issuing a voluntary recall of specific frozen waffle items. The recall is due to a possible contamination with Listeria monocytogenes, a harmful organism that can lead to severe health issues if consumed. The affected products are being removed from shelves as a precautionary measure to ensure consumer safety. It is crucial for individuals to check their frozen waffle products for the mentioned recall, as the presence of Listeria monocytogenes poses a serious health risk. This cautionary action by TreeHouse Foods, Inc. (NYSE: THS) is essential to prevent any potential health concerns related to the consumption of these products.

news.headline: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical signal buys; Apple gains on China iPhone sales. Dow Jones Futures flash signals.
news.summary: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical have shown positive buy signals on their recent earnings reports. Apple also regained a buy point following strong sales of the iPhone 16 in China. Investor optimism was reflected in the market as Dow Jones Futures reacted positively to these developments. This news was featured on Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the encouraging performance of these companies.

news.headline: $PG Procter & Gamble Q3 2024 Earnings
